title: MusicDisplay
description: This mod displays the currently playing music on Spotify. You can easily adjust the volume, pause the song, and more.
body:
**🎵 Spotify Music Display Mod**

Take full control of your music without ever leaving the game! This mod seamlessly integrates Spotify into your Minecraft client, offering a sleek overlay and easy access to playback controls.

**✨ Features**

**Full Playback Control**: Pause, resume, skip, or rewind tracks directly from the game.

**Live Overlay**: Displays the current song title, artist, album art, and a real-time progress bar.

**Search Spotify**: You can search for your song or playlist directly from the GUI!

**Volume Management**: Adjust Spotify volume instantly without Alt-Tabbing.

**Interactive Controls:**

⏯️ Play/Pause

⏮️ Previous / ⏭️ Next Track

🔀 Shuffle Toggle

🔁 Loop Toggle

❤️ Like/Save Songs

**State Synchronization**: Automatically syncs with changes made on other devices (e.g., your phone).

**Custom API Keys**: Use your own Spotify Client ID and Secret for full privacy and control.

**🛠️ How to Use**

**1. Initial Setup**

To connect the mod to your Spotify account, you need to provide a Client ID and Client Secret.

Go to the [Spotify Developer Dashboard](https://developer.spotify.com/dashboard).

Click Create app.

In the app settings, add this Redirect URI: http://127.0.0.1:8888/callback

Copy your Client ID and Client Secret.

**2. In-Game Commands**
   
Use the following commands in the game chat to save your credentials (they will be saved to your config file):

Set your ID:


```
.spotify clientid <YOUR_CLIENT_ID>
```


Set your Secret:


```
.spotify clientsecret <YOUR_CLIENT_SECRET>
```

**Authentication**

Once your credentials are set, enable the Spotify module in your client's GUI (HUD/Visuals tab). You will be prompted to authorize the app in your browser. After approving, your music will start syncing!

**⚙️ Configuration**

Configuration files are stored locally at: config/dripware/spotify.properties

**⌨️ Keybinds**

**O** - Opens a GUI

**.** - Opens a Chat Command

**📋 Requirements**

Spotify Account (Premium is recommended for the best API experience, though Free works with limitations).
Minecraft Java Edition (Fabric).

**👀 Preview**
